entry.title: New: CR 25-5 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-90, CD1, reappointing Lance T. Taguchi as the County Auditor of the County of Maui, effective July 1, 2025, for a term ending June 30, 2031, unless terminated earlier.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
